description: [ELON] Create daily reconciliation job that compares LIBBY sales totals vs Shopify GraphQL totals for previous day. Log discrepancies. Run via cron at 2 AM daily. Query Shopify GraphQL for orders created yesterday, compare to LIBBY orders table, flag missing or mismatched orders.
successCriteria: Cron job defined to run daily at 2 AM
Job queries Shopify GraphQL for yesterday's orders
